## What changed

Describe the focused change and the worker problem it addresses.

## Privacy and safety

- [ ] No credentials, private state, runtime data, evidence, or personal/customer information is included.
- [ ] Private report contents remain off-chain.
- [ ] AI changes do not claim compliance, approval, certification, competence, authorization, or safety.
- [ ] No live preprod mutation is required for ordinary validation.

## Verification

- [ ] Python syntax checks pass.
- [ ] JavaScript syntax checks pass.
- [ ] `workflow_smoke.py` passes, or the reason it cannot run is documented.
- [ ] Relevant desktop and mobile states were checked when the interface changed.

## Remaining risk

State anything reviewers should verify before merge.
